resolvedFindings.title: Root phase map omits declared direct children

transitions.reason: Resolved: root spec.md phase map rebuilt to all 24 on-disk children (000-023), byte-identical to graph-metadata children_ids; verified by adversarial gate (Sonnet max) rounds 1-2.

resolvedFindings.title: Data-quality phase status conflicts between root bridge and local index

transitions.reason: Resolved: 002-spec-data-quality/SUMMARY.md corrected to per-phase In Progress statuses matching child docs; root spec.md row-002 and Phase Transition Rules reconciled (045-050 re-nested 2026-07-04; 051-053 authored 2026-07-06, In Progress). Gate-verified.

resolvedFindings.title: Migration bridge retains extracted skill-advisor top-level child

transitions.reason: Resolved: context-index.md migration bridge corrected for the extracted skill-advisor child; gate-verified round 1 (cluster A content fixes all confirmed GENUINELY RESOLVED).

resolvedFindings.title: Phase R remediation scope and evidence are incomplete in child 006

transitions.reason: Resolved: 006 spec.md Phase R Addendum files-to-change table + implementation-summary Phase R narrative added; every cited code claim independently re-verified against live source; 72/72 cited tests pass. Gate-verified ACCEPT.

resolvedFindings.title: Children 007 and 008 publish conflicting lifecycle states

transitions.reason: Resolved: 007 consistently PARTIAL/90%, 008 consistently 100% across all five docs each; gate also fixed latent inconsistencies found during adversarial review. Gate-verified ACCEPT.

Resolved: 011 now internally consistent that REQ-008 numeric latency benchmark was satisfied via sibling packet 020-query-time-filter-benchmark (off mean 274.034ms, on mean 288.022ms, 5.1045% overhead) across checklist.md, spec.md, tasks.md, implementation-summary.md, and plan.md (frontmatter, phase line, Definition of Done). Expanded paraphrase grep sweep clean; strict validation Errors 0 with GENERATED_METADATA_INTEGRITY pass.

Resolved: all five 012 docs now agree the F1 refresh-cadence test is ENQUEUE-heavy via appendMemoryDriftSuspects and never calls deleteIndexedRecordIds (confirmed against the test file by the gate); original REQ-002 acceptance criterion retained with a disclosed 2026-07-10 verification note that the DELETE-cascade cost remains unverified. Strict validation Errors 0.

resolvedFindings.title: Completed packet retains unchecked required pre-merge decisions

transitions.reason: Resolved: 014 plan.md pre-merge decision rows reconciled with evidence; metadata regenerated; strict validation exit 0. Gate-verified.

resolvedFindings.title: Plan preserves superseded repo-wide validation-impact figures

transitions.reason: Resolved: 015 plan.md superseded figures annotated SUPERSEDED with corrected 80/2,235 figures and corrected within-parent breakdown, cross-referenced to spec.md addendum and packet 019 flag graduation. Gate-verified ACCEPT.

resolvedFindings.title: Implementation summary documents reverted broad flag semantics as shipped

transitions.reason: Resolved: 016 implementation-summary Files Changed row, Key Decisions row, and What Was Built F5b bullet all now state isQueryTimeExistenceFilterEnabled() delegates to isStrictOptInEnabled() (strict {true,1}), matching shipped code (capability-flags.ts:244). Gate re-verified against source; whole-file grep shows zero residual broad-vocabulary claims.

resolvedFindings.title: Archived vector inclusion has conflicting documented defaults

transitions.reason: Resolved: ENV_REFERENCE.md archived-vector row states default ON matching isFeatureEnabled (unset=enabled) and names the two stale code comments as known-stale prose; verified against search-flags.ts/rollout-policy.ts/lineage-state.ts by the gate; env-reference drift guard test green. Gate-verified ACCEPT.

resolvedFindings.title: Surface-alignment heading retains former phase number

transitions.reason: Resolved: 005-speckit-surface-alignment spec.md heading updated to current phase number; metadata regenerated via documented scripts; GENERATED_METADATA_INTEGRITY passes. Gate-verified.

resolvedFindings.title: Child 007 retains template-path labels in public titles

transitions.reason: Resolved: zero template-path labels remain in 007 public titles; required SPECKIT_TEMPLATE_SOURCE provenance comments preserved. Gate-verified ACCEPT.

resolvedFindings.title: Child 013 exposes a scaffold template marker in its public title

transitions.reason: Resolved: 013 spec.md title scaffold marker removed; metadata regenerated; strict validation exit 0. Gate-verified.

resolvedFindings.title: Child 016 exposes a scaffold template marker in its public title

transitions.reason: Resolved: 016 spec.md title scaffold marker removed. Gate-verified.

resolvedFindings.title: 022 implementation-summary title retains a template placeholder

transitions.reason: Resolved: 022 implementation-summary title placeholder replaced. Gate-verified; remaining 022 SCAFFOLD_NEVER_TOUCHED debt (plan/tasks/checklist template titles) is pre-existing and tracked as follow-up outside this review scope.
